article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.13. Attachment 2 - Previous Council Report dated May 27, 2025 (HVAC System) 2026-04-14 .pdf

briefs.title: Council to Vote on $1.04M Increase for City Building HVAC Maintenance Contract
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on increasing an existing contract with Just Mechanical Ltd. by $1,043,700 (including tax) to cover heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) maintenance and repairs at additional City-owned buildings, bringing the total contract value to roughly $4.83 million.
briefs.action_required: Monitor the council decision if your business supplies HVAC services or competes for City maintenance contracts.
